```ts
import { GoudGame } from 'goudengine';

const game = new GoudGame({ width: 800, height: 600, title: 'My Game' });

while (!game.shouldClose()) {
  game.beginFrame(0.2, 0.3, 0.4, 1.0);

  const dt = game.deltaTime;

  if (game.isKeyPressed(256)) {
    break;
  }

  game.endFrame();
}

game.destroy();
```
